page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Rapid large-scale prokaryote pan genome analysis
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A high speed stand alone pan genome pipeline, which takes annotated assemblies in gff3 format (produced by prokka (seemann, 2014)) and calculates the pan genome.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A high speed stand alone pan genome pipeline, which takes annotated assemblies in GFF3 format (produced by Prokka (Seemann, 2014)) and calculates the pan genome.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A high speed stand alone pan genome pipeline, which takes annotated assemblies in GFF3 format (produced by Prokka (Seemann, 2014)) and calculates the pan genome.
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: A high speed stand alone pan genome pipeline, which takes annotated assemblies in GFF3 format (produced by Prokka (Seemann, 2014)) and calculates the pan genome.
